pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_f32(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<f32>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_f32_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<f32>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_f64(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<f64>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_f64_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<f64>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u16_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u16>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u32(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<u32>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u32_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u32>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u64(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<u64>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u64_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u64>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_u8_vec(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'_>::get_tag_unsigned<T: core::convert::TryFrom<u64>>(&mut self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> tiff::TiffResult<T>
impl<'l> tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'l>
pub fn tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'l>::tag_iter(self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = tiff::TiffResult<(tiff::tags::Tag, tiff::decoder::ifd::Value)>> + 'l
impl<'lt> core::marker::Freeze for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> !core::marker::Send for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> !core::marker::Sync for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> core::marker::Unpin for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>
impl<'lt> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>

impl core::marker::Sync for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
impl core::marker::Unpin for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
pub trait tiff::encoder::TiffKind
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKind::OffsetArrayType: ?core::marker::Sized + tiff::encoder::TiffValue
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKind::OffsetType: core::convert::TryFrom<usize, Error = core::num::error::TryFromIntError> + core::convert::Into<u64> + tiff::encoder::TiffValue
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKind::convert_offset(u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<Self::OffsetType>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKind::convert_slice(&[Self::OffsetType]) -> &Self::OffsetArrayType
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKind::write_entry_count<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, usize) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKind::write_header<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKind::write_offset<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
impl tiff::encoder::TiffKind for tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::OffsetArrayType = [u64]
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::OffsetType = u64
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::convert_offset(u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<Self::OffsetType>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::convert_slice(&[Self::OffsetType]) -> &Self::OffsetArrayType
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::write_entry_count<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, usize) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::write_header<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindBig::write_offset<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
impl tiff::encoder::TiffKind for tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::OffsetArrayType = [u32]
pub type tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::OffsetType = u32
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::convert_offset(u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<Self::OffsetType>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::convert_slice(&[Self::OffsetType]) -> &Self::OffsetArrayType
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::write_entry_count<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, usize) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::write_header<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffKindStandard::write_offset<W: std::io::Write>(&mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, u64) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub trait tiff::encoder::TiffValue
pub const tiff::encoder::TiffValue::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const tiff::encoder::TiffValue::FIELD_TYPE: tiff::tags::Type
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffValue::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffValue::count(&self) -> usize
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffValue::data(&self) -> alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>
pub fn tiff::encoder::TiffValue::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>

impl<T, const N: usize> tiff::encoder::TiffValue for [T; N] where [T]: tiff::encoder::TiffValue
pub const [T; N]::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const [T; N]::FIELD_TYPE: tiff::tags::Type
pub fn [T; N]::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn [T; N]::count(&self) -> usize
pub fn [T; N]::data(&self) -> alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>
pub fn [T; N]::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
impl<T: tiff::encoder::TiffValue + ?core::marker::Sized> tiff::encoder::TiffValue for &T
pub const &T::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const &T::FIELD_TYPE: tiff::tags::Type
pub fn &T::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn &T::count(&self) -> usize
pub fn &T::data(&self) -> alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>
pub fn &T::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>
pub type tiff::encoder::Predictor = tiff::tags::Predictor
pub mod tiff::tags
pub enum tiff::tags::ByteOrder
pub tiff::tags::ByteOrder::BigEndian
pub tiff::tags::ByteOrder::LittleEndian
impl tiff::tags::ByteOrder
pub fn tiff::tags::ByteOrder::convert(self, tiff::tags::Type, &mut [u8], tiff::tags::ByteOrder)
pub const fn tiff::tags::ByteOrder::native() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
pub fn tiff::tags::ByteOrder::clone(&self) -> tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::cmp::Eq for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
pub fn tiff::tags::ByteOrder::eq(&self, &tiff::tags::ByteOrder) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
pub fn tiff::tags::ByteOrder::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Copy for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::Freeze for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::Send for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::Sync for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::Unpin for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::tags::ByteOrder
#[non_exhaustive] #[repr(u16)] pub enum tiff::tags::CompressionMethod
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::Deflate = 8
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::Fax3 = 3
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::Fax4 = 4
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::Huffman = 2
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::JPEG = 6
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::LZW = 5
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::ModernJPEG = 7
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::None = 1
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::OldDeflate = 32946
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::PackBits = 32773
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::SgiLog = 34676
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::SgiLog24 = 34677
pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::Unknown(u16)

pub struct tiff::tags::ValueBuffer

pub fn tiff::tags::ValueBuffer::empty(tiff::tags::Type) -> Self
pub fn tiff::tags::ValueBuffer::from_value<T: tiff::encoder::TiffValue + ?core::marker::Sized>(&T) -> Self
pub fn tiff::tags::ValueBuffer::set_byte_order(&mut self, tiff::tags::ByteOrder)
pub fn tiff::tags::ValueBuffer::set_value<T: tiff::encoder::TiffValue + ?core::marker::Sized>(&mut self, &T)
impl core::default::Default for tiff::tags::ValueBuffer
pub fn tiff::tags::ValueBuffer::default() -> Self
impl core::marker::Freeze for tiff::tags::ValueBuffer
impl core::marker::Send for tiff::tags::ValueBuffer
impl core::marker::Sync for tiff::tags::ValueBuffer

pub type tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::Inner = u32
pub const tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::BITS_PER_SAMPLE: &'static [u16]
pub const tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::SAMPLE_FORMAT: &'static [tiff::tags::SampleFormat]
pub const tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::TIFF_VALUE: tiff::tags::PhotometricInterpretation
pub fn tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::floating_point_predict(&[Self::Inner], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<u8>)
pub fn tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32::horizontal_predict(&[Self::Inner], &mut alloc::vec::Vec<Self::Inner>)
impl core::marker::Freeze for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::marker::Send for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::marker::Sync for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::marker::Unpin for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::encoder::colortype::RGBA32

pub struct tiff::encoder::ImageEncoder<'a, W: 'a + std::io::Write + std::io::Seek, C: tiff::encoder::colortype::ColorType, K: tiff::encoder::TiffKind>
impl<'a, W: 'a + std::io::Write + std::io::Seek, T: tiff::encoder::colortype::ColorType, K: tiff::encoder::TiffKind> tiff::encoder::ImageEncoder<'a, W, T, K>
pub fn tiff::encoder::ImageEncoder<'a, W, T, K>::encoder(&mut self) -> &mut tiff::encoder::DirectoryEncoder<'a, W, K>

pub fn [u8]::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>

impl<T, const N: usize> tiff::encoder::TiffValue for [T; N] where [T]: tiff::encoder::TiffValue

pub const [T; N]::FIELD_TYPE: tiff::tags::Type

pub fn [T; N]::count(&self) -> usize

pub fn [T; N]::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>

pub const &T::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const &T::FIELD_TYPE: tiff::tags::Type
pub fn &T::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn &T::count(&self) -> usize

pub fn &T::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut tiff::encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> tiff::TiffResult<()>

pub tiff::tags::CompressionMethod::ZSTD = 50000

impl core::marker::Unpin for tiff::UsageError
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::UsageError
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::UsageError
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::UsageError
pub struct tiff::Directory
impl tiff::Directory
pub fn tiff::Directory::contains(&self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> bool
pub fn tiff::Directory::empty() -> Self
pub fn tiff::Directory::extend(&mut self, impl core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = (tiff::tags::Tag, tiff::decoder::ifd::Entry)>)
pub fn tiff::Directory::get(&self, tiff::tags::Tag) -> core::option::Option<&tiff::decoder::ifd::Entry>
pub fn tiff::Directory::is_empty(&self) -> bool
pub fn tiff::Directory::iter(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = (tiff::tags::Tag, &tiff::decoder::ifd::Entry)> + '_
pub fn tiff::Directory::len(&self) -> usize
pub fn tiff::Directory::next(&self) -> core::option::Option<tiff::tags::IfdPointer>
pub fn tiff::Directory::set_next(&mut self, core::option::Option<tiff::tags::IfdPointer>)
impl core::clone::Clone for tiff::Directory
pub fn tiff::Directory::clone(&self) -> tiff::Directory
impl core::fmt::Debug for tiff::Directory
pub fn tiff::Directory::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::iter::traits::collect::FromIterator<(tiff::tags::Tag, tiff::decoder::ifd::Entry)> for tiff::Directory
pub fn tiff::Directory::from_iter<T: core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = (tiff::tags::Tag, tiff::decoder::ifd::Entry)>>(T) -> Self
impl core::marker::Freeze for tiff::Directory
impl core::marker::Send for tiff::Directory
impl core::marker::Sync for tiff::Directory
impl core::marker::Unpin for tiff::Directory
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for tiff::Directory
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for tiff::Directory
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for tiff::Directory
pub type tiff::TiffResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, tiff::TiffError>
